## §3 — FFA Checks at Handover

1. No `.github/agents/` changes in diff
2. No `governance/canon/` changes in diff
3. No `.github/workflows/` changes in diff
4. No production code (`.ts`, `.tsx`, `.js`, `.sql`) in diff
5. FR-104–111 present (no conflict with existing FR-103)
6. TR-103–110 present (no conflict with existing TR-102)
7. FRS-to-TRS traceability matrix updated
8. Wave 16.1–16.9 defined in implementation plan with all 25 gaps traced
9. All 25 gaps in BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER gap register
10. PREHANDOVER proof committed before IAA handover invocation
